vision_profile.current_state: Rohan is a Cloud Support Engineer with 4 years of experience, skilled in AWS basics, Linux, and incident management, but feels stuck in reactive support.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Lack of architectural design experience, specific skills in Kubernetes architecture, Terraform, cloud cost optimization, and enterprise solution design.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Rohan aims to transition into a Cloud Solutions Architect role, designing and implementing scalable AWS and Kubernetes infrastructure, earning 180,000 INR/month, and moving away from night shifts.
vision_profile.top_motivation: To stop working night shifts, leverage his existing cloud exposure into higher-impact engineering work, and advance his career beyond reactive support roles.

milestones.identity_statement: Lay a robust foundation in advanced AWS services and Infrastructure as Code to transition from support to proactive design.
milestones.market_value_display: Associate Cloud Architect / Senior Cloud Engineer (10-15 LPA)
